moments.title: Wimbledon Men's Final
moments.blurb: The 2026 Wimbledon Championships conclude today with the highly anticipated Men's Singles Final featuring world No. 1 Jannik Sinner against Alexander Zverev.

angles.name: Final Showdown
angles.copy: It all comes down to this! Who will lift the Gentlemen's Singles trophy at Wimbledon today: Sinner or Zverev?

angles.name: Tennis History
angles.copy: Today marks the end of Wimbledon 2026. What's been your highlight from the past two weeks of incredible tennis?

moments.title: The Open Championship Practice Days Begin
moments.blurb: The 154th Open Championship officially begins its practice days today at Royal Birkdale Golf Club, with tournament play starting on Thursday.

angles.name: Tee Off at Birkdale
angles.copy: The Open Championship is underway! Practice days are happening at Royal Birkdale from today, building up to the main event. Who's your pick for the Claret Jug?

angles.name: Golf's Greatest
angles.copy: It's the start of The Open at Royal Birkdale. Get ready for a week of world-class golf action. Will we see a new champion or a familiar face?

moments.title: FIFA World Cup Semi-Finals
moments.blurb: The FIFA World Cup 2026 semi-finals kick off this week, with France facing Spain on Tuesday, July 14, and England taking on Argentina on Wednesday, July 15.

angles.name: England's Big Match
angles.copy: It's the one we've all been waiting for! England face Argentina in the World Cup semi-final on Wednesday. Can the Three Lions reach the final?

angles.name: Semi-Final Showdown
angles.copy: The World Cup semi-finals are set! France vs Spain on Tuesday, then England vs Argentina on Wednesday. Who are you backing to make the final?

moments.title: FIFA World Cup Final
moments.blurb: The FIFA World Cup 2026 culminates with the final match on Sunday, July 19, at MetLife Stadium in New York.

angles.name: Road to the Final
angles.copy: Just one week to go until the FIFA World Cup Final! Who do you predict will be playing for the trophy next Sunday?

angles.name: World Champions
angles.copy: The biggest prize in football will be decided next Sunday. Get ready for the FIFA World Cup 2026 Final!

moments.title: Sam Fender & Olivia Dean make Chart History
moments.blurb: Sam Fender and Olivia Dean's duet 'Rein Me In' is the UK's Official Singles Chart Number 1 for its 16th non-consecutive week, making it the longest-running British Number 1 single of all time.

angles.name: Chart Record Breakers
angles.copy: History made! Sam Fender & Olivia Dean's 'Rein Me In' is the longest-running British Number 1 single ever with 16 weeks at the top! Incredible! #OfficialCharts

angles.name: Still Number One
angles.copy: Another week, another Number 1 for Sam Fender & Olivia Dean! 'Rein Me In' continues its record-breaking run. What's your favourite track on the chart right now?

moments.title: Gareth Gates is 42
moments.blurb: Today, July 12, marks the 42nd birthday of English pop singer and Pop Idol runner-up Gareth Gates, known for hits like 'Unchained Melody'.

angles.name: Happy Birthday Gareth
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 42nd Birthday to Pop Idol's own Gareth Gates! What's your favourite of his early 00s hits?

moments.title: Liz Mitchell (Boney M.) is 74
moments.blurb: Liz Mitchell, the lead singer of iconic disco group Boney M., celebrates her 74th birthday today, July 12.

angles.name: Boney M. Legend
angles.copy: Happy 74th Birthday to Liz Mitchell, the unforgettable voice of Boney M.! Time to put on some 'Rivers of Babylon'!

moments.title: John Petrucci (Dream Theater) is 59
moments.blurb: Founding member and guitarist of progressive metal band Dream Theater, John Petrucci, turns 59 today, July 12.

angles.name: Prog Rock Icon
angles.copy: Happy 59th Birthday to the incredible John Petrucci of Dream Theater! What's your favourite Dream Theater track?

moments.title: Roger McGuinn (The Byrds) is 84
moments.blurb: Roger McGuinn, co-founder and frontman of The Byrds, celebrates his 84th birthday tomorrow, July 13.

angles.name: Byrds Legend
angles.copy: Tomorrow, Roger McGuinn of The Byrds turns 84! Get ready to celebrate a true folk-rock pioneer. What's your top Byrds song?

moments.title: Deborah Cox is 52
moments.blurb: Canadian R&B singer Deborah Cox, known for hits like 'Nobody's Supposed to Be Here', turns 52 on July 13.

angles.name: R&B Queen's Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 52nd Birthday to the incredible Deborah Cox tomorrow! What's your favourite track from the R&B powerhouse?

moments.title: Olly Alexander (Years & Years) is 36
moments.blurb: Olly Alexander, frontman of Years & Years and recent UK Eurovision representative, celebrates his 36th birthday on July 15.

angles.name: Birthday for Olly
angles.copy: Sending early birthday wishes to the fabulous Olly Alexander, who turns 36 on Wednesday! What's your favourite Years & Years track?

moments.title: Linda Ronstadt is 80
moments.blurb: Multi-Grammy Award-winning artist Linda Ronstadt, known for her versatile career spanning rock, country, and pop, turns 80 on July 15.

angles.name: Music Legend's Milestone
angles.copy: Happy 80th Birthday to the legendary Linda Ronstadt on Wednesday! Celebrate her incredible career by playing one of her timeless hits.

moments.title: Stewart Copeland (The Police) is 74
moments.blurb: Drummer and co-founder of The Police, Stewart Copeland, celebrates his 74th birthday on July 16.

angles.name: Rock Royalty
angles.copy: On Thursday, the legendary Stewart Copeland of The Police turns 74! What's your favourite track featuring his iconic drumming?

moments.title: Martha Reeves (Martha & The Vandellas) is 85
moments.blurb: Motown legend Martha Reeves, lead singer of Martha Reeves and the Vandellas, celebrates her 85th birthday on July 18.

angles.name: Motown Icon
angles.copy: Get ready to celebrate a true Motown legend! Martha Reeves turns 85 this Friday. What's your favourite Martha and the Vandellas hit?

moments.title: Don Henley (Eagles) is 79
moments.blurb: Don Henley, drummer and co-lead vocalist of the Eagles, will celebrate his 79th birthday on July 22.

angles.name: Eagles Legend
angles.copy: A huge voice in rock turns 79 next week! Happy Birthday to the incredible Don Henley of The Eagles. What's your go-to Eagles track?

moments.title: Selena Gomez is 34
moments.blurb: Singer, actress, and businesswoman Selena Gomez will celebrate her 34th birthday on July 22.

angles.name: Pop Star's Birthday
angles.copy: Get ready to celebrate! Selena Gomez turns 34 next week. What's your favourite song from the pop sensation?

moments.title: UK School Summer Holidays Begin
moments.blurb: Many schools across the UK will begin their summer holidays this week, marking the start of the main break for students.

angles.name: School's Out for Summer
angles.copy: The countdown is over for many! School summer holidays are beginning this week across the UK. What are your big plans for the break?

angles.name: Summer Break Vibes
angles.copy: For parents and kids alike, summer holidays are here! Wishing everyone a fantastic break as schools start to close their doors this week.
